Off Calendar Aug-29-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Aug-20-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Matter heard with case #453097.
Plaintiff: Alex Yakovlev, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court taken the matter under submission.
Proposed Judgment rec'd in court.
